hero.title: Break free from Excel and scattered recruitment data
hero.description: Replace clunky spreadsheets with a streamlined dashboard designed for solo recruiters and small teams.

painPoints.title: Centralized recruiting management, instead of scattered files and unstable spreadsheets.

scattered.title: Jobs scattered across tabs
scattered.desc: Stop wasting time searching through bookmarks and email threads. Store all job mandates and client requirements in one unified system.

tracking.title: Hard to track candidates
tracking.desc: Don't let potential talent get lost in your inbox. Manage the entire recruitment lifecycle in one place.

screening.title: Slow screening process
screening.desc: Manual filtering takes hours. Our scoring system does it in seconds.

pipeline.title: Lost control of the process
pipeline.desc: Track the status of every candidate right on a single dashboard.

data.title: No data for decisions
data.desc: Measure efficiency and improve hiring rates with real-world data.

workflow.title: Dashboard Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Seamless transition from sourcing to successful hiring.

jobCenter.title: Recruitment Operations Hub
jobCenter.desc: Organize roles by client, priority, or status. A modern interface helps you grasp information quickly and take action instantly.
points: Custom tags for specific role types

candidateProfile.title: Candidate Profiles, Redefined
candidateProfile.desc: No more digging through PDFs. The system automatically extracts and displays key information in a clear, readable way.
points: Flexible interview notes format, easy to present.

matchScore.title: Algorithmic Fit Scoring
matchScore.desc: Instantly see which candidates best match your job requirements based on skills, experience, and budget expectations.
points: Track and compare candidate compensation expectations.

visualPipeline.title: Visual Pipeline Tracking
visualPipeline.desc: Smooth Kanban boards, no more spreadsheet fatigue. Drag and drop with ease and track progress visually.

dataDriven.title: Data that helps you decide better
dataDriven.desc: Understand your entire hiring funnel at a glance. Easily track conversion rates, time-to-hire, and candidate source quality.

howItWorks.title: Set up in minutes, not days.

steps.title: Create your first job
steps.desc: Import requirements from PDF or link. HR Lite automatically builds a recruitment structure ready to start.

steps.title: Add candidates & notes
steps.desc: Bulk upload CVs or add manually. Interview notes are saved right next to each candidate.

steps.title: Track the pipeline
steps.desc: Visualize the entire journey from screening to selection with Kanban boards and smart analytics.

freelance.title: Freelance HR
freelance.desc: Handle multiple clients simultaneously without losing track of candidates or project details.

independent.title: Independent Recruiters
independent.desc: A lean CRM focused on your talent sourcing and selection speed.

smallTeam.title: Small Recruiting Teams
smallTeam.desc: Collaborate with founders or managers without getting overwhelmed by bulky ATS systems.

finalCta.title: Ready to level up your recruitment?
finalCta.description: Experience HR Lite today — be the first to explore the Dashboard.

items.q: How is HR Lite different from a traditional ATS?
items.a: Traditional ATS systems are built for large corporations with thousands of applicants. HR Lite is built for individuals—emphasizing speed, editorial clarity, and ease of use, rather than bulky enterprise features.
Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and follow strict GDPR regulations to ensure candidate personal data is always protected.

items.q: Can I import my existing spreadsheets?
items.a: Absolutely. We provide a smart import tool that helps match your Excel or CSV columns to our structured data fields in seconds.
The team plan is currently under development. Soon, you will be able to invite members, share pipelines, and collaborate on notes easily within the same workspace.
We believe recruitment is a craft that requires finesse. Therefore, the tool you use should also be carefully designed—worthy of the talent you are seeking.
